title: polypodium × vianei
intro: Polypodium × vianei, also known as Vian's Polypody, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Polypodiaceae family, derived from the cross between Polypodium cambricum and Polypodium vulgare. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polypodium × vianei include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism, and support the treatment of various infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Polypodium × vianei are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
